eng-pin-and-dependabot.description: Pin actions/checkout to SHA in copilot-setup-steps.yml + add .github/dependabot.yml — push rejected (protected workflow files). Manual apply instructions in issue #10.

notes: Issue #2 ([aw] No-Op Runs) - auto-managed, no action. Issue #10 is the failed eng PR (blocked by protected files, instructions there for manual apply). PRs #14 and #15 are open draft docs PRs from update-docs bot. PR #6 (docs: document infra workflows + vscode tooling) was rebased onto origin/main on 2026-04-19 run #24636492652 — conflict resolved by keeping weekly-research, agentics-maintenance.yml, and copilot-setup-steps.yml all three layout lines; branch pushed via push_to_pull_request_branch, comment added to PR #6. Monthly Activity issue is #11.
